hooks.command: py %PLUGIN_ROOT%\scripts\codex\_dispatch.py pretooluse || python %PLUGIN_ROOT%\scripts\codex\_dispatch.py pretooluse || python3 $PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/codex/_dispatch.py pretooluse || python $PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/codex/_dispatch.py pretooluse
